user.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Step 1: Login
user.description:
Open the following URL in your browser and log in with your Bosch SingleKey ID:

`{auth_url}`

After logging in, the browser will show a **404 page** — that is expected. Copy the full URL from the browser address bar and click **Submit** to continue.

auth.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Step 2: Paste URL
auth.description:
Paste the full URL from the browser address bar below.

It starts with: `https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...`

error.invalid_redirect_url: Could not find an auth code. Paste the full URL starting with https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...
error.token_exchange_failed: Token exchange failed. The code may have expired — go back and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Bosch servers. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: Bosch Smart Home Camera is already configured.

data.enable_snapshot_button: Enable control buttons (Refresh Snapshot / Open Live Stream)
data.enable_auto_download: Auto-download all event files in background

relogin_show.title: Re-login — Step 1: Open URL
relogin_show.description:
Open the following URL in your browser and log in with your Bosch SingleKey ID:

`{auth_url}`

After logging in, the browser shows a **404 page** — that is expected. Copy the full URL from the address bar and click **Submit**.

relogin_paste.title: Re-login — Step 2: Paste URL
relogin_paste.description:
Paste the full URL from the browser address bar.

It starts with: `https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...`

error.invalid_redirect_url: Could not find an auth code. Paste the full URL starting with https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...
error.token_exchange_failed: Token exchange failed. The code may have expired — try again.

trigger_snapshot.name: Trigger Snapshot Refresh
trigger_snapshot.description: Force an immediate snapshot refresh for all Bosch cameras.

open_live_connection.name: Open Live Connection
open_live_connection.description: Open a live stream proxy connection for a Bosch camera.

camera_id.name: Camera ID
camera_id.description: Cloud ID of the camera (e.g. xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)
